# ── External / third-party dependencies ───────────────────────────────────────
#
# Add third-party libraries here, e.g.:
#
#   add_subdirectory(some_lib)
#
#   find_package(SomeLib REQUIRED)
#
# For header-only / FetchContent libraries, a typical pattern is:
#
#   include(FetchContent)
#   FetchContent_Declare(
#       some_lib
#       GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/owner/some_lib.git
#       GIT_TAG        v1.2.3
#   )
#   FetchContent_MakeAvailable(some_lib)
